title: teramnus repens
intro: Teramnus repens, also known as sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a perennial climbing legume native to Africa and India, characterized by its compound leaves and delicate white or yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Teramnus repens include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce menstrual cramps, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat fever and rheumatism, among other conditions. Teramnus repens is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and it can also be used as a powder or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
